title: Echomist
description: Echomist aims to expand the Deep Dark by utilising underused materials!
body:
---

## THIS MOD IS UNDERGOING A MAJOR REWORK. FOR PROGRESS REPORTS  / TEASERS, VISIT THE DISCORD LINKED BELOW!
https://discord.gg/gRFRDhFn2p
---

**Version 3.6**: 

- Ambracite, made by placing Sculk Catalyst below a Budding Amethyst!

- Ambracite Blocks, all accessible in a stonecutter!

- Ambracite Falchion
  - Transfers "Affliction" to the hit target when bar is full.
  - Affliction halves the targets healing.

- Ambracite Token
  - When used, heals the user for 2 hearts and applies Regeneration to them.

- Potions of Silence
  - Just throw an echo shard into the brewing stand and you'll get yourself some peace and quiet from these pesky sculk sensors!

- Echo Shards and Ambracite Shards are now valid trim materials!
